contact.title: THANK YOU FOR YOUR REQUEST!
contact.description: IT HAS BEEN SUCCESSFULLY SENT TO YOUR ARTIST. FROM NOW ON, EVERYTHING HAPPENS DIRECTLY VIA YOUR EMAIL. DON'T WORRY IF THERE'S A DELAY BEFORE GETTING A RESPONSE. THANK YOU FOR YOUR TRUST, SEE YOU SOON.

tattoo.title: TATTOO REQUEST
tattoo.description: Select an artist then complete the form with all the details of your project.
tattoo.artistHint: Choose the artist you want to work with
tattoo.noMailMessage: To contact this artist, please send them an email directly.
tattoo.openMailApp: Open mail app to contact the artist
tattoo.objectHint: The subject of your tattoo request
tattoo.descriptionHint: Describe your tattoo project in detail
tattoo.descriptionPlaceholder: I would like to get tattooed...
tattoo.sizeHint: Indicate the approximate size in centimeters
tattoo.zoneHint: Body part where the tattoo will be done
tattoo.availabilityHint: Your availability for the tattoo session
